---
name: "🚀 Deploy notice"
about: "Manually announce a deploy (deploys are normally announced automatically by CI)"
title: "🚀 Deploying"
labels: maintenance
---

<!-- start: 2026-06-27T22:00:00+02:00 end: 2026-06-27T22:15:00+02:00 expectedDegraded: api -->

Deploys can be announced automatically by your app's CI
(`deploy-announce.yml`). Use this template only for a manual deploy banner.

Edit the HTML comment above (`start` / `end` required, `expectedDegraded` optional),
then close the issue when the deploy is done.
